{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032320381203B7FCE91E92531FFD5D"}"},"total":10382},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7316065031794262810","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"强烈推荐这本书
 从刚开始的，不按套路出牌到后面的根本猜不到主角下一步。
而且主角三观超正，里面那些专家思路也清晰。反正就是你看完之后就怀疑他们都在进化，只有你没有进化
内容也很搞笑，而且剧情环环相扣你永远想不到主角下一步会干啥[爱慕][爱慕][爱慕][爱慕][爱慕][爱慕][爱慕][爱慕][爱慕][爱慕][爱慕][爱慕][爱慕][爱慕][爱慕]强烈推荐好吧"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1703404929,"group_id":"7219987130745883682","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"如果有哪些问题，请多多指教","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nzylw2Xg9NdYhz7Q9k1gQ6j1+jHRYWKyJJelPdWNgo7n","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d849efa0061843e58874375f89182412~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793823&x-signature=PtutuTOE1c7kDcb8V41JSswHAfw%3D","user_id":"1852029058693711","user_name":"爱吃蜜枣面包的三三"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1852029058693711","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7219987130745883682","book_info":{"abstract":"专门研究未解悬案的苏晨，穿越到了平行世界，被选入了一档逃亡类节目中。
　　他将作为节目唯一的逃亡者，受到公安系统内部选出的高级专家团队的追捕！
　　节目的本意，是向公众展示公安的力量，让人们看到，在现代社会，抓住一个人有多么容易。
　　然而，所有人都没想到，苏晨竟然开局潜入了公安系统，还用自己的模拟手法，把专家组带入了一个又一个的悬案中，考验着所有的顶尖专家！
　　大学碎尸案、白金市连环杀人案、海航航班失踪案，乃至异国的开膛手杰克、黑色大丽花······
　　一瞬间，朝野震动，人们震惊于苏晨的高智商。
　　而诸多悬案的真相，也渐渐浮出水面·······
　　
　　《论苏晨有多少种作案手法》——龙国出版社
　　“一场智商碾压的盛宴，一个逃亡的神探！”——纽约日报点评
　　“我们的素材基本上取自苏晨。”——爆火网剧《他是谁》主创团队
　　“我的第一反应是嫉妒，踏马的，怎么这么牛逼！”——著名作家玉华","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/865f89c1ae519c03376da0b9b6f5d196","author":"零九三妖","author_id":"","book_id":"7219987130745883682","book_name":"你专家组，怎么跟我一逃犯学刑侦","book_short_name":"让你逃亡，你咋成神探了","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7219995556939694648","read_count":"92764","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3284662"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"1564","tags":"悬疑脑洞,系统,推理,直播,开局,破案,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/abaf845456ac8949f5fe8ad72665d20e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779453492&x-signature=5W7I2GQzLEJvZhcO8VQNEKkZjZc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"532593546631056","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"201"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032320381203B7FCE91E92531FFD5D"}"},"relate_i 　　他将作为节目唯一的逃亡者，受到公安系统内部选出的高级专家团队的追捕！
　　节目的本意，是向公众展示公安的力量，让人们看到，在现代社会，抓住一个人有多么容易。
　　然而，所有人都没想到，苏晨竟然开局潜入了公安系统，还用自己的模拟手法，把专家组带入了一个又一个的悬案中，考验着所有的顶尖专家！

　　而诸多悬案的真相，也渐渐浮出水面·······
